inputs.label: Number of Attendees
inputs.businessContext: Total number of people attending the event.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of people attending the event.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total de personnes assistant à l'événement.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número total de personas que asisten al evento.

inputs.label: Average Travel Distance per Attendee (one-way)
inputs.businessContext: One-way distance travelled by each attendee (return trip considered automatically).

label_i18n.tr: Katılımcı Başına Ortalama Seyahat Mesafesi (tek yön)
label_i18n.fr: Distance de déplacement moyenne par participant (aller simple)
label_i18n.es: Distancia media de viaje por asistente (ida)

businessContext_i18n.en: One-way distance travelled by each attendee (return trip considered automatically).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Her katılımcının kat ettiği tek yön mesafe (dönüş yolculuğu otomatik olarak dikkate alınır).
businessContext_i18n.de: Einfache Distanz, die jeder Teilnehmer zurücklegt (Hin- und Rückfahrt wird automatisch berücksichtigt).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Distance parcourue par chaque participant en aller simple (le trajet retour est pris en compte automatiquement).
businessContext_i18n.es: Distancia de ida recorrida por cada asistente (el viaje de vuelta se considera automáticamente).
businessContext_i18n.ar: مسافة السفر ذهابًا لكل حاضر (تُحتسب رحلة العودة تلقائيًا).

inputs.label: Travel Emission Factor
inputs.businessContext: CO2 emitted per passenger-km (0.2 for car, 0.04 for train, 0.255 for flight).

businessContext_i18n.en: CO2 emitted per passenger-km (0.2 for car, 0.04 for train, 0.255 for flight).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yolcu-km başına salınan CO2 (araba için 0.2, tren için 0.04, uçuş için 0.255).
businessContext_i18n.de: CO₂ pro Personenkilometer (0,2 für Auto, 0,04 für Zug, 0,255 für Flug).
businessContext_i18n.fr: CO2 émis par passager-km (0,2 pour la voiture, 0,04 pour le train, 0,255 pour l'avion).
businessContext_i18n.es: CO2 emitido por pasajero-km (0.2 para coche, 0.04 para tren, 0.255 para vuelo).
businessContext_i18n.ar: ثاني أكسيد الكربون المنبعث لكل كيلومتر-راكب (0.2 للسيارة، 0.04 للقطار، 0.255 للطيران).

inputs.label: Venue Energy Consumption per Day
inputs.businessContext: Daily electricity and heating consumption of the event venue.

label_i18n.fr: Consommation énergétique du lieu par jour
label_i18n.es: Consumo energético del recinto por día

businessContext_i18n.en: Daily electricity and heating consumption of the event venue.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Etkinlik mekanının günlük elektrik ve ısıtma tüketimi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Täglicher Strom- und Heizverbrauch des Veranstaltungsorts.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Consommation quotidienne d'électricité et de chauffage du lieu de l'événement.
businessContext_i18n.es: Consumo diario de electricidad y calefacción del recinto del evento.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الاستهلاك اليومي للكهرباء والتدفئة في مكان الفعالية.

inputs.label: Event Duration
inputs.businessContext: Number of days the event takes place.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of days the event takes place.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Tage, an denen die Veranstaltung stattfindet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de jours pendant lesquels l'événement a lieu.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de días que dura el evento.

inputs.label: Waste per Attendee per Day
inputs.businessContext: Average waste generated per attendee per day.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average waste generated per attendee per day.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Katılımcı başına günlük ortalama atık miktarı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittlicher Abfall, der pro Teilnehmer und Tag anfällt.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Quantité moyenne de déchets générés par participant par jour.
businessContext_i18n.es: Promedio de residuos generados por asistente por día.
businessContext_i18n.ar: متوسط النفايات الناتجة لكل حاضر يوميًا.

inputs.label: Accommodation Nights per Attendee
inputs.businessContext: Number of hotel nights per attendee.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of hotel nights per attendee.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Katılımcı başına düşen otel gecesi sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de nuits d'hôtel par participant.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de noches de hotel por asistente.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
